content:
{
  "artifact_type": "research_agent_prompt",
  "depth_tier": "D2_PRODUCTION",
  "runtime_target": "Codex",
  "should_block": false,
  "blocked_reason": null,
  "compiled_intent": {
    "Objective": "Build a governed research agent prompt for finance operations in Latin America, using the memory lens to surface compliance-relevant patterns, policy gaps, and claim-limit exposures from fragmented enterprise data.",
    "Scope": "The agent must ingest overbroad one-pass lock inputs (messy, missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, ambiguous acceptance criteria) and produce a structured research output with explicit validation gates. Focus on source policy and claim limits across LATAM finance ops.",
    "Constraints": [
      "Must operate within Codex runtime environment.",
      "Must use memory_lens to cross-reference historical compliance events and policy versions.",
      "Must not hallucinate missing context; flag unknowns explicitly.",
      "Must enforce validation gates at each research stage (source ingestion, pattern extraction, claim-limit mapping, output generation).",
      "Must comply with enterprise compliance lead governance requirements for Latin America."
    ],
    "Success Criteria": [
      "Agent produces a research artifact with at least three validated compliance patterns from the overbroad input.",
      "Claim-limit exposures are identified and mapped to specific policy sources.",
      "All validation gates are documented in the output with pass/fail status.",
      "Ambiguous acceptance criteria are flagged with recommended clarification steps.",
      "Output is SR8-compilable into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract."
    ],
    "Output Contract": {
      "format": "JSON",
      "sections": [
        "research_summary",
        "compliance_patterns",
        "claim_limit_analysis",
        "validation_gates_log",
        "ambiguity_flags",
        "recommended_actions"
      ],
      "validation_required": true,
      "compilable_to_sr8": true
    }
  }
}
